summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of employee evaluation system v5. All 7 requested features verified and working correctly: 9-Box Matrix with 'Empleado A' title, percentages inside cells, Profile/Results view with side-by-side comparison and difference indicator, Admin/Employee mode evaluator counters, KPIs UI with 4 functional tabs, Dashboard with metrics, and Evaluations 360 with active templates.
passed_tests: 9-Box Matrix view title is 'Empleado A' (H1) with subtitle 'Clasificación de Empleados A, B y C'
All 9 category names preserved inside cells: Empleado A, Futuro A, Quiere ser A, Performer Sólido, Alto Potencial, En Desarrollo, Difícil de Sacar, Bajo Rendimiento, Acción Urgente
Percentages displayed INSIDE each 9-box cell with format 'V: XX-XX%' and 'R: XX-XX%'
Admin mode shows 'QUIÉNES EVALUARON' with actual evaluator names (Director Ops, Emp1, Emp2..., etc.)
Employee mode shows 'CUÁNTOS EVALUARON' with 'X personas' count format (1 personas, 8 personas, etc.)
Profile/Results view shows 'Resultado Calculado' and 'Autoevaluación' side by side
Difference indicator displays when calculated classification differs from auto-evaluation (e.g., 'El empleado se autoevaluó como A pero el resultado calculado es B2')
KPIs UI has all 4 functional tabs: Plantillas KPI, Asignar a Empleados, Evaluar KPIs, Comparativa
KPIs Plantillas tab shows KPI templates with weights and thresholds
KPIs Comparativa tab shows bar chart and line chart visualizations
Dashboard displays 4 metric cards: Empleados (8), Prom. Valores (69%), Empleados A (1), Atención (3)
Dashboard shows mini 9-box matrix titled 'Empleado A' with employee counts per cell
Evaluations 360 displays 2 active templates with 'Activa' badges
Generate Link modal opens with 4 evaluator type buttons: Superior, Subordinados, Compañeros, Clientes
Manual Evaluation view shows employee list with current classifications and override functionality
Admin/Employee toggle in sidebar works correctly with visual indicator
Navigation between all 7 main views works seamlessly
Professional UI design with consistent Tailwind CSS styling and Spanish localization
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a visual mockup system with NO backend. All data is static/mocked in App.js. Key features verified: 9-Box matrix with 'Empleado A' title (not replacing category names), percentages inside cells (V: XX-XX%, R: XX-XX%), Admin shows evaluator names while Employee shows counts, Profile view has side-by-side calculated vs auto-evaluation comparison with difference indicator, KPIs has 4 tabs (Plantillas, Asignar, Evaluar, Comparativa). All navigation and interactive elements working correctly.
